<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band05_chunk003.pdf#page=4 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band05 p106 -->

<!-- header: KLOSTER INDERSDOR -->

<!-- header: KLOSTER INDERSDORF -->


[[File:Band05_chunk003_p004_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band05_chunk003_p004_img002.jpg|thumb|C Vision des hl. Augustinus]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band05 p107 -->
